_comment: DEMO BRANCH ONLY. Curated adult PK dossiers for offline demos. When a drug is listed here, retrieve_drug_data serves this JSON (source_mode=demo) and skips live PubMed/openFDA. Never merge demo → master.
_selection: Top performers from validation-eval (strict band + grades + pathway diversity).

citations.claim: Curated adult PK for demo (clindamycin): CL=15.0 L/h, Vd=60.0 L, fm={'cyp3a4': 0.9}
citations.source: PaedScale demo pack (reviewed seed; not live PubMed/openFDA)

clindamycin.confidence: demo pack — curated offline PK; skip live retrieval for speed/reliability
